deals.desc: MyMcDonald's Rewards members get free medium fries with any $1+ in-app purchase every Friday through year-end at participating locations.
Score a sandwich, 4-pc nuggets, fries, and drink in one bundled McValue Meal Deal via the app.
Wendy's Rewards members get free any-size Hot & Crispy Fries with any purchase via app or website every Friday through year-end.
Royal Perks members get one free any-size fry per week with a $3+ app purchase — an ongoing loyalty perk.
Royal Perks members can score a discounted Whopper every Wednesday (prices vary by location) through the BK app.

deals.deal: $9.99 Any Pizza — Any Crust, Up to 7 Toppings
deals.desc: Order any pizza with up to 7 toppings on any crust (including Parmesan Stuffed Crust) for $9.99 online or in-app through July 26, 2026.
Choose two or more medium 2-topping pizzas, chicken, sandwiches, pasta, cheesy breads, or loaded tots at $6.99 each when ordering online.

deals.deal: Pie Rewards: Free Medium Pizza at 60 Points
deals.desc: Earn 10 Pie Rewards points per $5+ order; redeem 60 points for a free medium 2-topping pizza, or 20 points for a free drink or bread bites.
Get any 1-topping carryout pizza (excluding XL), 8-piece wings, or boneless chicken for $7.99 when ordering online or in the app.

deals.deal: $1 Off Cantina Chicken Rolled Quesadilla (New Sign-ups)
deals.desc: New Taco Bell Rewards sign-ups earn a $1-off Cantina Chicken Rolled Quesadilla reward automatically through July 22, 2026.
Every Tuesday from 3–11 PM, rewards members can grab three Snack Tacos starting at $2.49 via the Taco Bell app.

deals.deal: Thursday Drops: 3 Grilled Chicken Tacos from $3.59
deals.desc: Every Thursday from 3–11 PM, rewards members can grab three Grilled Chicken Tacos starting at $3.59 via the Taco Bell app.
Sonic is celebrating America 250 with select items — including a Slush Float, Jr. Double Cheeseburger, All-American Dog, and Medium Onion Rings — each for $2.50 through July 12.
Get half-price drinks and slushes every day from 2–4 PM (2–5 PM at some locations) when you order ahead with the Sonic mobile app.

deals.deal: Free Eagle Cup Beverage with Purchase
deals.desc: Dunkin' Rewards members get one free medium beverage with purchase via the patriotic Eagle Cup promotion at participating locations through July 31, 2026.
Visit Dunkin' 12 times in a calendar month to unlock Boosted Status and earn 12 points per $1 spent (vs. standard 10) for the next 3 months via the app.
KFC app members can get a rotating daily bucket deal for $10 on weekdays — 24 nuggets Mon/Fri, 8 legs & thighs Tues, 8 tenders Thurs, 10 wings Wed.
Earn 10 points per eligible dollar on digital orders; redeem through the rotating Secret Recipe Vault for free items like nuggets, chicken sandwiches, or a free side.
Get a Roast Beef or Crispy Chicken Sandwich plus three sides and a small drink for $7.99 at participating Arby's locations.
New Chipotle Rewards members receive a free guacamole reward with a $5+ minimum purchase when they join and order through the app.

deals.deal: MyPanera Rewards: Free Delivery on $25+ Orders
deals.desc: MyPanera Rewards members get free delivery on any order of $25 or more as an ongoing loyalty benefit through the Panera app or website.
Starbucks now accepts any clean reusable cup for your drink order at participating locations, saving on waste and earning bonus Stars for Rewards members.
